title: IT Support Specialist
description: Plaid is looking for an IT Support Specialist to join our San Francisco headquarters and support our rapidly growing engineering team. You'll ensure infrastructure and systems reliability for a fintech platform connecting millions of users to financial data. Come work at the epicenter of fintech innovation.
responsibilities: Provide comprehensive IT support for engineers and business teams
Manage device lifecycle and ensure security compliance across all endpoints
Troubleshoot network, hardware, and software issues
Implement and maintain identity and access management systems
Support development environment setup and deployment
Participate in oncall rotation for critical infrastructure issues

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or related field; or equivalent experience
skills: Strong communication and customer service skills

benefits: On-site position at Plaid's San Francisco HQ
Comprehensive health, dental, and vision coverage
Free meals and beverages on campus
